title: trifolium andinum var. andinum
intro: Trifolium andinum var. andinum, also known as Andean clover, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Andean clover can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in traditional medicine preparations.
